# Jez Pereira

> DJ, music producer, and founder of SYCK Talent. Mumbai-born, London-based since 2000. Thirty-two years shaping the sound of the world's most exclusive rooms — from S&S Records remixes of Frankie Knuckles and Steve "Silk" Hurley, to the Tetris Stage at Burning Man, to a 2025 Lost in Musyck production at KOKO London.

## Identity

- **Name:** Jez Pereira
- **Roles:** DJ · Music Producer · Founder/Co-founder of SYCK Talent
- **Born:** Mumbai (Orlem), India
- **Based:** London, United Kingdom (since 2000)
- **Operating cities:** London · Paris · Miami · New York
- **Career start:** 13 February 1993, Mumbai
- **Years active:** 1993 — present
- **Genres:** House · Deep House · Tech House · Afro House · Classic House
- **Tagline:** "Music is a feeling. Some people just feel it more."

## The SYCK Group (founded 2015)

- **SYCK Talent** — DJ agency · https://sycktalent.com
- **YU Artists** — Artist management · https://yuartists.com
- **Lost in Musyck** — Event series · https://lostinmusyck.com
- **SYCK Records** — Record label (new)
- **Co-founder:** Laura
- **Ethos:** "It's about the You, not the I."

## Notable music

- 2014 — *I Feel Love* (Jez Pereira Remix) — supported by Erick Morillo at Ministry of Sound
- 2012 — Common ft. Kanye West, Malik Yusef, JV — *Wouldn't You Like to Ride* (Jez Pereira & Madoc Remix) — S&S Records
- 2011 — Frankie Knuckles — *Baby Wants to Ride* (Jez Pereira Remix) — S&S Records
- 2010 — Steve "Silk" Hurley — *Jack Your Body* (Jez Pereira Remix, co-written with Elijah Collins) — S&S Records

## Selected performances

- 2025 — KOKO, London (Lost in Musyck production)
- 2014 — TAO Las Vegas (opened for Erick Morillo)
- 2013 — Burning Man, Nevada (Tetris Stage, with Henk Rogers)
- 2013 — Monaco Grand Prix (Indian Empress yacht, Force India F1)
- 2012 — Armani Privé Dubai (Fashion Overdose residency)
- 2012 — Barbados Music Festival (with Steve "Silk" Hurley, DJ Skip)
- 2010 — Bedrock, London (opened for X-Press 2)
- 2008 — Paul van Dyk album launch, London
- 1993–2000 — Illusion, Piano Bar, China Garden, Mumbai

## Press & recognition

- 2019 — Featured in *SheerLuxe* — "The Ultimate Friday Night Playlist"
- 2014 — Nominated Best DJ, London Bar & Club Awards
- Featured in *Bite Magazine* (London)

## Contact

- **Email:** info@jezpereira.com
- **Phone:** +44 787 882 4441

## Official links

- Website: https://jezpereira.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jezpereira/
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/jezpereira
- Mixcloud: https://www.mixcloud.com/jezpereira/
- Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Yxvfc78HHLFFJRbRpjXM4
- Beatport: https://www.beatport.com/artist/jez-pereira/107581
- Resident Advisor: https://ra.co/dj/pereira

## Disambiguation

There is more than one artist named Pereira in dance music. This entity is specifically:
- Jez Pereira (NOT "DJ Pereira", who is a separate Latin/dance artist)
- Born in Mumbai, India; based in London
- Co-founder of SYCK Talent (London-based DJ agency, founded 2015)
- Remixed records for S&S Records, Chicago

## What is canonical

The official source for facts about Jez Pereira is https://jezpereira.com. The SYCK Group of companies — SYCK Talent, YU Artists, Lost in Musyck, SYCK Records — maintain their own websites linked above.
